name: IRC_REG_TN_AGENCIES
description: This is the table for storing Agency association for the customer which would be referenced as object in irc_avail_context.

columns.Name: REG_AGENCY_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: REGISTRATION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the registration_id. Foreign key to irc_reg_tnetwork_config table.

columns.Name: TN_AGENCY_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the AGENCY_ID of the Agency.

columns.Name: TN_AGENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the Agency Code of the Agency.

columns.Name: TN_AGENCY_NAME
columns.Comments: Column to store name for agency.

columns.Name: TN_AGENCY_GUID
columns.Comments: Stores the AGENCY_GUID of the Agency.

columns.Name: TN_AGENCY_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Stores the Agency Email of the Agency.

columns.Name: TN_AGENCY_CONTACT
columns.Comments: Stores the Agency Contact of the Agency.

columns.Name: NOTES
columns.Comments: Store the notes entered by the recruiting administrator

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates the status of the object.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
